words.clue: A segment that is dependent on another segment above it (its parent) in the hierarchy.
You add it to a PCB that allows a program to see only specific fields within a segment but cannot be allowed to see other information within the same segment.
It's the parameter in a PCB that means you're calling a secondary index.
These are the only types of segments in the secondary index database.
A secondary index is its own separate database and must use this access method.
A routine that can be used for security encryption.
HDAM/PHDAM databases have no index; what do they use instead for direct access?
It's used to define system configuration macros, application resource macros, and VTAM device macros.
A region type that does not attach to the control region address space.
A data set that contains information on the current status of the logging information.

l10n.couldNotGenerateCrossword: Could not generate a crossword with the given words. Please try again with fewer words or words that have more characters in common.
l10n.couldNotGenerateCrosswordTooFewWords: Could not generate a crossword. You need at least two words.
l10n.probematicWords: Some words could not be placed. If you are using fixed words, please make sure that their position doesn't prevent other words from being placed. Words with the same alignment may not be placed touching each other. Problematic word(s): @words

a11y.crosswordGrid: Crossword grid. Use arrow keys to navigate and the keyboard to enter characters. Alternatively, use Tab to navigate to type the answers in Fill in the Blanks style fields instead of the grid.
a11y.check: Check the characters. The responses will be marked as correct, incorrect, or unanswered.
a11y.showSolution: Show the solution. The crossword will be filled with its correct solution.
a11y.retry: Retry the task. Reset all responses and start the task over again.
